description: A walk-in guest requests a room, but the hotel is sold out.

nodes.task_description: Check the PMS to confirm the hotel is sold out.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent verifies there are no rooms available.

nodes.task_description: Politely inform the guest that the hotel is full.

expected_outcome.expected: The agent communicates the situation clearly and courteously.

nodes.task_description: As a courtesy, call a nearby partner hotel to check for their availability and offer to help the guest make a reservation there.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent assists the guest in finding alternative accommodation, providing excellent service despite being unable to accommodate them.
